title: COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER - 211info
text: COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER SOUTH CLINIC COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care including diabetes prevention, nutritional counseling, podiatry, medical massage, imaging, and vaccinations. 480 Wartahoo Lane Canyonville, OR 97417 Eligibility: Citizens of the Cow Creek Band of Umpqua Tribe of Indians, employees, and the general public Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 672-8533 4 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 672-8533 Option #4 South Clinic Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Health insurance information if applicable AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Indian Health Service Clinics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
